prompt: Invent an original, vivid metaphor for the experience of learning a new language as an adult. Explain it in three sentences.
response: Embarking on the journey of learning a new language as an adult is akin to attempting to sculpt a statue blindfolded. You feel your way through the rough darkness of the unfamiliar phonetics, gradually discerning patterns and forms. As comprehension gradually dawns and you shed your blindfold, you find yourself transforming a formless block into a masterpiece of linguistic artistry.
